description_long: This bungalow features a low, wide profile with a prominent, overhanging hip roof in a warm brown color. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral tone, accented by a brick or stone base trim. Large sliding glass doors and several windows provide ample natural light, with the main entrance set on a small concrete porch. The structure sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, with paved walkways leading to the front and side. The roof extends to create shaded areas around the perimeter, and the overall design is simple yet functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods. The building appears to be a single-story dwelling with a modest footprint and a welcoming, open facade.
description: A single-story bungalow with a wide hip roof, light exterior walls, brick trim, and large windows, set on a green lawn with paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large sliding glass doors, and a small porch with a paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof eaves, a solid wall with fewer windows, and the continuation of the brick trim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long, shaded veranda area, additional windows, and the full width of the hip roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the main walkway, front steps, and three reference images placed in front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
